title: Word Formation: The World of Sport

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text: Sport plays an important part in the lives of millions of people around the world. Many young people join a club to improve their fitness and to make new friends, because regular exercise keeps both the body and the mind 1.1. _________. A good coach offers careful 1.2. _________ so that beginners learn the correct skills from the very start. Modern sport has grown enormously in 1.3. _________, and huge crowds now fill stadiums to watch their favourite teams. The atmosphere during a match can be incredibly 1.4. _________, especially when the score is close. Of course, success does not come easily. A true 1.5. _________ must work hard for many years, often waking up before dawn to practise. Players who push their bodies too far risk a serious 1.6. _________, which can end a career. The greatest 1.7. _________ are usually those who stay calm under pressure and never give up. They believe that being mentally 1.8. _________ matters just as much as natural talent.
